ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "avatar_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's avatar image */,
  "percentile" REAL /* The percentile rank of the user */,
  "percent_earned" REAL /* Percentage of badges earned */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined the Fedora Project */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "total_contributions" INTEGER /* Total number of contributions made by the user */,
  "reputation_score" INTEGER /* Reputation score of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "badges" (
  "badge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each badge */,
  "badge_name" TEXT /* Name of the badge */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the badge */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the badge image */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags associated with the badge */,
  "times_awarded" INTEGER /* Number of times the badge has been awarded */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the badge (e.g., code, documentation, community) */,
  "difficulty_level" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the badge (e.g., beginner, intermediate, advanced) */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date the badge expires (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("badge_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_badges" (
  "user_badge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user-badge relationship */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "badge_id" INTEGER /* ID of the badge */,
  "date_awarded" TEXT /* Date the badge was awarded to the user */,
  "award_type" TEXT /* Type of award (e.g., automatic, manual, nomination) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_badge_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_badges_badge_id FOREIGN KEY ("badge_id") REFERENCES badges ("badge_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_badges_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assertions" (
  "assertion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assertion */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the assertion */,
  "assertion_data" TEXT /* JSON data containing details of the assertion */,
  "assertion_type" TEXT /* Type of assertion (e.g., code contribution, documentation, community participation) */,
  "evidence_url" TEXT /* URL to evidence supporting the assertion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assertion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assertions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rankings" (
  "ranking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ranking */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* The user's rank */,
  "user_count" INTEGER /* Total number of users */,
  "ranking_category" TEXT /* Category of the ranking (e.g., overall, code, documentation) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ranking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rankings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., badge earned, contribution made) */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the activity */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the activity */,
  "activity_category" TEXT /* Category of the activity (e.g., code, documentation, community) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., badge earned, new contribution opportunity) */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contribution_opportunities" (
  "opportunity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each opportunity */,
  "opportunity_name" TEXT /* Name of the opportunity */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the opportunity */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the opportunity (e.g., code, documentation) */,
  "difficulty_level" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the opportunity (e.g., beginner, intermediate, advanced) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("opportunity_id")
)
